title: Pune school principal shared NEET-related questions for money: CBI tells court
content: Following Manisha Sanjay Havaldar’s arrest, she was produced before a court in Pune and is currently in transit remand; she is likely to be produced in a Delhi court on May 25

title: BJP MLA Mahesh Tenginakai insulted migrant workers in Hubballi assuming they are infiltrators, says Congress leader Rajat Ullagaddimath
content: Congress leader criticises police officers, who were present, accusing them of failing to follow the rule of law

title: Sharmila slams govt. for filing cases against noted academic
content: In a statement, Ms. Sharmila said it was unbecoming of the NDA government in the State to target an academic and intellectual in such a manner

title: Police protection provided at home of Cockroach Janta Party founder
content: The protection is to ensure there is no crowding around his residence as the CJP is trending online, police official says

title: I wasn’t allowed to see her body, mother of murdered girl alleges
content: The mother of the 10-year-old girl, who was sexually assaulted and killed near Coimbatore, said her husband took the child’s body to his native place in Salem and cremated it without her consent or allowing her to see the mortal remains

title: CBSE again extends deadline for scanned answer book requests till May 25
content: The CBSE had earlier extended the deadline from May 22 to May 23, then till May 24, and has now further extended it till May 25 midnight amid complaints from students over difficulties in accessing scanned copies of answer books through the portal

title: Quad remains ‘vital’, says Japanese Foreign Minister, rejecting concerns over the grouping’s importance in the Indo-Pacific
content: Ahead of Quad Foreign Ministers’ Meeting, Toshimitsu Motegi says critical mineral cooperation is at the top of the agenda, calls for better infrastructure, protection for intellectual property rights in India

title: Plea in Supreme Court to probe Cockroach Janta Party ‘activities’, fake law degrees
content: Vernacular, culturally direct, and non-elite modes of institutional speech associated with rural and non-metropolitan traditions are increasingly subjected to disproportionate ridicule within elite digital ecosystems, the petition by a Supreme Court advocate says

title: Marco Rubio in India Highlights: Jaishankar addresses National Day reception at the U.S. Embassy
content: U.S. President Donald Trump calls U.S. Ambassador to India Sergio Gor and says that he "loves India, loves Modi"; U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said that the two nations will soon seal a trade deal

title: JMM, Cong. bid to divide society, undermine tribal rights won’t succeed: BJP
content: Jharkhand govt. trying to undermine customs through new PESA Act rules, says Marandi; stresses the need to preserve, protect, and develop all sites of worship belonging to the tribal communities

title: Master plan to transform Kochi into model city to come up in six months, says Satheesan
content: Grand civic receptions accorded to the new Chief Minister in the city and Paravur; actor Mammootty says Satheesan has been entrusted with a huge responsibility; Kochi will be developed on a ‘twin-city’ model, says the CM

title: Minister’s assurance on Plus One seats brings relief to north Kerala students
content: ‘All arrangements for the rollout of the admissions process are in place, and the process will begin once the State Cabinet gives its approval on May 25’

title: Traffic snarls around Edappally, Palarivattom spill over into NH Bypass, other arterial roads
content: ‘Edappally has over time emerged as the epicentre of the snarls, with the congestion spilling over to the Edappally-Aroor NH Bypass and other key arterial roads in the city’

title: Delivery agent’s kindness, head constable’s persistence help find missing dog
content: Bruno, a four-year-old Labrador from Sainikpuri, was reunited with his owner after nearly 24 hours of of anxiety and frantic searching

title: Disambiguating a year of flux: expert panels at The Hindu Huddle, 2026
content: The sixth edition of the ideas conclave of The Hindu Group, The Hindu Huddle, will be held in Bengaluru on June 5 and 6

title: VIT distributed scholarships worth over ₹100 crore for government school students since 2008: VIT Chancellor
content: G. Viswanathan said that the scheme aimed to support high-achieving students from rural government schools who secure excellent marks in higher secondary examinations but lack the financial means to pursue further education

title: Govt. plans to complete paddy procurement over next 10 days: Uttam Kumar Reddy
content: The Minister for Civil Supplies says the procurement target revised to 75 LT based on production estimates

title: Residents block key stretch near Katpadi demanding resumption of water supply
content: On being informed, Melpadi police and revenue officials rushed to the spot and pacified agitated residents who, then, dispersed peacefully

title: SC’s revival of Section 124A for consenting accused brings back a colonial law the country did not want
content: The Supreme Court’s clarification allowing consenting accused to face Section 124A proceedings comes even as the constitutional validity of the sedition law remains under challenge before the top court

title: 12 days after death, family bids tearful farewell to Twisha Sharma; second autopsy done
content: The special investigation team of Bhopal Police, along with the four-member panel of AIIMS New Delhi and forensic experts, visits mother-in-law Giribala Singh’s house to inspect the spot of Twisha Sharma’s death

title: National president Nabin asks BJP State unit not to be complacent while citing T.N. example of Opposition not benefitting from DMK’s failure
content: BJP national president urges Karnataka State unit to instil confidence among people that it is a better political alternative

title: Tigress which killed four women trapped in Maharashtra
content: The tigress, spotted near Pawanpar pond in Sindewahi taluka in Bramhapuri forest division, was tranquillised, says a forest official

title: Assam Rifles apprehend key accused in 2023 abduction-murder of two Meitei students
content: The main accused, a key member of the United Kuki National Army, an insurgent group active in Manipur’s Churachandpur, has been handed over to the CBI

title: Congress asks its rank and file to be alert against deletion of voters ahead of SIR exercise in Karnataka
content: Many things are happening with respect to SIR. That is why we are working to create awareness about it. The poor and common people need to be told what SIR is: Shivakumar

title: Suvendu urges BJP workers to follow law, says government will do ‘sabka hisab’
content: Trinamool Congress chairperson Mamata Banerjee terms recently held polls “mockery in the name of democracy” and accuses the BJP government of destroying institutions she had ‘built’

title: Grand Vachana Vijayotsava procession marks Basavotsava in Bidar
content: The procession began from Basava Udyana in Shivnagar and passed through Papanash Gate and Papanash Temple before culminating at Akka Annapurnatai’s Aikya Mantapa at Basavagiri

title: Idukki DCC president nominated murder-accused to committee without consultation, say members
content: Demand for ouster of C.P. Mathew from the post grows louder after he nominated the prime accused in the Dheeraj murder case to the committee

title: WB government directs districts to set up holding centres for detained illegal foreigners
content: The development comes days after Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari said that his government would follow a new policy of “detect, delete and deport” while dealing with “illegal infiltrators”. Last year in May, Union Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) directed all States and Union Territories to identify and verify illegal immigrants from Bangladesh and Myanmar (Rohingyas) within 30 days

title: The Hindu Huddle on Campus to be held at Khaja Bandanawaz University on May 26
content: The event will focus on the theme “The Age of Distraction and Doomscrolling: Its Impact on Student Behaviour and Mental Health”

title: 10 dead in Bhatkal estuary, one still missing
content: ‘They likely entered the estuary to collect shellfish and did not estimate the force of the current that had increased due to the recent rainfall’

title: KTR accuses Congress govt. of conspiring to install meters to farm power connections
content: He says govt. is planning to privatise power distribution by fixing prepaid meters to all categories of consumers

title: Andhra Pradesh breaks 10-year heat record again as mercury crosses 48°C
content: Three stations record above 48°C for the third time in less than a week; APSDMA warns of severe heatwave conditions in more mandals over next three days

title: Fuel Prices Hiked By Rs 7 In 11 Days. Why Petrol, Diesel Rates May Rise Again
content: For oil companies to fully recover past losses, petrol, diesel prices in India would theoretically need to rise by another Rs 28 to Rs 33 per litre.

title: Twisha Sharma Supreme Court Hearing LIVE Updates: Top Court To Take Up Twisha Sharma Death Case Today
content: Twisha Sharma Death Case Reaches Supreme Court Hearing LIVE Updates: A Supreme Court bench headed by Chief Justice of India Surya Kant, and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and Justice Vipul M Pancholi will hear the case.

title: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: Rubio Arrives In Agra For Taj Mahal Tour
content: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

title: EPS And Unmaking Of AIADMK: How He Lost MGR, Jayalalithaa's Political Legacy
content: If there was ever a trusted stand-in for Jayalalithaa, it was O Panneerselvam, who was twice entrusted with the Chief Minister's chair when she had to step down following court convictions.

title: US Iran War Live Updates: : US Refusing To Accept Parts Of Possible Iran Peace Deal, Report
content: US Iran War Live Updates: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf said Iran's armed forces had rebuilt their capabilities during the ceasefire.

title: "May Agree To Later Nuke Talks If...": US' Olive Branch Amid Iran Standoff
content: Trump insisted the US blockade on Iranian shipping near the Strait of Hormuz would remain in place until an agreement "is reached, certified, and signed".

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Sensex Jumps 830 Points, Nifty Up 230 As Crude Oil Price Falls 5%
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: US crude fell over 8%, Brent down over 5% amid possibility of a US-Iran peace deal.

title: Analysis: The 'Good Girl' Trap That Killed Twisha Sharma
content: In the Twisha Sharma death case - the latest focal point of national media - there were "indications" from the very start that she was in a toxic marriage,

title: Karnataka NEET Aspirant Failed Class 12, Lied To Family: Twist In Suicide Case
content: According to police, Bhagyashree allegedly died by suicide by hanging herself from a ceiling fan at her apartment.

title: Fuel Gets Costlier By Rs 2, Petrol Crosses Rs 100 In Delhi
content: Petrol, Diesel Prices Hiked By Rs 2, Fourth Time In Two Weeks, Crosses Rs 100 In Delhi Amid Iran-US War

title: Trump Losing Iran War? Experts Say "Short-Term Romp Turning Into Failure"
content: Trump campaigned for a second term promising no unnecessary military interventions but has brought the US into an entanglement that could do lasting damage to his foreign policy record and credibility abroad.

title: No Animal Sacrifice At Public Places On Bakrid: Yogi Adityanath
content: Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath directs vigilance and regulated animal sacrifice for Bakri Eid.

title: Explainer: Despite Trump's Pressure, Cuba May Not Turn Out Like Venezuela
content: Cuba has been a US antagonist for decades, since Fidel Castro's 1959 revolution. Trump is strongly supported by hardline Cuban-Americans in Florida, who have pushed for US-instigated regime change for decades.

title: 'Any Appropriately Located Alternate Plot?' Delhi Gymkhana Club Writes To Centre
content: The Delhi Gymkhana Club wrote in a letter to the Centre that any sudden action against it would impact multiple stakeholders, including employees and patrons.

title: How Urban India's Weekend Obsession Became A $50 Million Market
content: Industry estimates peg India's pickleball market at nearly Rs 7,500 crore by 2030. Just two years ago, the sport barely existed outside niche circles.

title: Fuel prices hiked again: Petrol, diesel rates raised by over Rs 2; 4th increase in 2 weeks
content: Fuel prices have seen another significant jump, with petrol and diesel costs rising by Rs 2.61 and Rs 2.71 per litre respectively. This marks the fourth increase in under two weeks, pushing cumulative hikes close to Rs 7.5 per litre.  Consumers face mounting pressure as import costs climb due to global crude oil prices and a weaker rupee.

title: CSK IPL 2026 autopsy: How the season collapsed, moment by moment
content: Five-time champions Chennai Super Kings missed the IPL playoffs for the third consecutive season after a disappointing 2026 campaign. Injuries, an underperforming overseas contingent, and a lack of consistent rhythm plagued the team this year. Despite individual bright spots, CSK face a significant tactical reset to regain their championship form.

title: Bihar cops frisked by Sonu-Monu gang members before house raid; 2 SHOs suspended after video viral
content: In a shocking turn of events in Patna, two Station House Officers (SHOs) were suspended after footage surfaced showing gang supporters conducting searches on police officials. This incident came to light following an alleged shooting incident involving the notorious Sonu-Monu gang targeting a local leader.

title: JP Morgan CEO to the world from China: America is still a safe haven for investments
content: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon affirmed the U.S. as a safe investment haven despite acknowledging China's growing global influence and "more consistent" international dealings. He also highlighted America's resilience and strong fundamentals, while warning of AI's significant impact on jobs and advocating for companies to eliminate bureaucratic managers.

title: Rupee jumps 40 paise to 95.2 against US dollar amid Middle East peace hopes
content: The Indian rupee opened stronger against the US dollar, gaining 40 paise to 95.20 in early trade, buoyed by optimism over a potential US-Iran peace deal. Positive sentiment was further fueled by progress in US-India trade agreement discussions, with the dollar index also declining.

title: Disabled security guard thrashed, mowed down twice by Scorpio over parking tiff in West Delhi
content: A 60-year-old security guard was brutally murdered in West Delhi after being run over twice by a car following an argument. CCTV footage shows the victim, Bijender, being assaulted with a stick before the vehicle deliberately targeted him. Police are investigating the incident as a murder, with multiple teams formed to identify the SUV and its occupants.

title: After Kohli spat, Head’s wife reveals online abuse: 'Feels like a repeat of World Cup'
content: Australian cricketer Travis Head and wife Jessica faced online abuse from some Indian fans after Head’s on-field spat and alleged handshake snub involving Virat Kohli during an IPL 2026 match. Jessica said friends and family were also targeted. The incident followed SRH’s win over RCB and reignited concerns about toxic social media behaviour in cricket.

title: CEO Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
content: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.

title: Furnace-like conditions return to Delhi-NCR
content: Sunday brought a scorching heatwave to Delhi, with temperatures climbing to a blistering 43-45 degrees Celsius. Air quality may take a hit due to dust from Pakistan wafting in. The weather forecast whispers of light rain and breezy winds on Monday, but real respite might not come until Friday when rain and thunderstorms promise to cool things down significantly.

title: Jeff Bezos to Amazon users: We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system
content: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

title: Jasprit Bumrah scripts unwanted IPL record, becomes first-ever bowler to...
content: Jasprit Bumrah endured a disappointing IPL 2026 season, finishing with just four wickets in 13 matches for Mumbai Indians. Rested for MI’s final game, Bumrah ended with a bowling average of 102.50, the worst in T20 history for bowlers with 40-plus overs in a tournament. Coach Mahela Jayawardene blamed fitness issues and a lingering niggle.

title: Kin perform Twisha's last rites after 2nd autopsy; 3-judge SC bench to hear case today
content: Former actor-model Twisha Sharma's funeral took place in Bhopal amidst her family's fight for justice.  The Supreme Court has taken suo motu cognizance of the case, following allegations of dowry harassment. A specialized AIIMS Delhi team conducted a second post-mortem to meticulously preserve evidence and investigate injuries, aiming to uncover the truth behind her suspicious death.

title: Trump turnaround: Open the straits, close the war
content: A new understanding with Iran is emerging to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. This comes after weeks of military escalation. The United States seeks to prevent global economic disruption from energy shipment issues. An agreement is reportedly nearing finalization, though details remain unclear. Iran denies commitments to give up uranium or unconditionally reopen the straits.

title: Struggling to walk, Kambli spotted during MI’s final IPL game — Watch
content: Vinod Kambli was spotted at Wankhede Stadium during Mumbai Indians’ final IPL 2026 match, with videos showing him struggling to walk and being supported by two people. Despite appearing frail, Kambli looked cheerful, easing concerns over his health. His appearance also backed wife Andrea Hewitt’s recent claim that the former India batter was “fine” despite ongoing health issues.

title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for this week - check list
content: Stock market recommendations: Samvardhana Motherson, and Zydus Wellness have been recommended as top stocks to buy for the week starting May 25, 2026 by Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk:

title: Oil prices dip below $100 per barrel despite Hormuz being closed for three months
content: Oil prices dropped significantly as markets reacted to optimism surrounding a potential US-Iran peace deal, despite President Trump urging negotiators not to rush. Key issues like the Strait of Hormuz and frozen assets remain unresolved, tempering expectations for an imminent breakthrough in the ongoing conflict.

title: Malaika Arora SPOTTED with rumoured beau Harsh Mehta - WATCH
content: Malaika Arora and rumoured beau Harsh Mehta were recently spotted together, reigniting dating speculations. Harsh picked up Malaika from her mother's home, with her son Arhaan and pet dog also present. The duo later returned home, with Harsh seen dropping them off. This latest sighting adds to ongoing buzz surrounding their relationship, which neither has confirmed.

title: CUET UG 2026 exam scheduled for May 28 postponed due to Bakrid, NTA to announce new dates soon
content: The National Testing Agency has postponed the CUET UG 2026 exam, originally set for May 28, due to the Id-ul-Zuha holiday. New dates will be announced soon. This national entrance exam, crucial for undergraduate admissions across numerous universities, will now have a revised schedule. Candidates should monitor official NTA and CUET UG websites for updates.

title: Sooryavanshi breaks world record despite flop show against MI
content: Rajasthan Royals' Vaibhav Sooryavanshi etched his name in T20 history, becoming the highest-scoring teenager in a single tournament with 583 runs in IPL 2026, surpassing Devdutt Padikkal's record. Despite a rare off-day against Mumbai Indians, the young sensation's stellar season, marked by an incredible strike rate and a century, has propelled RR to the playoffs.

title: 'Not like the one made by Obama': Donald Trump says their Iran deal is 'exact opposite'
content: US President Donald Trump declared any future Iran deal under his leadership would be "good and proper," contrasting it with the Obama-era agreement. He asserted his proposed deal would prevent Tehran from acquiring nuclear weapons, unlike the previous one which he claims provided significant funds and a path to a bomb.

title: TMC comes 4th, CPM 2nd as BJP wrests Falta by 1 lakh-plus votes
content: BJP secured a massive victory in Falta, winning by over a lakh votes, marking its highest margin in the 2026 assembly elections. The Trinamool Congress suffered a significant defeat, coming in fourth, while the CPM emerged as a distant second. This outcome suggests a notable shift in minority votes towards the CPM and Congress.

title: Weeks before WC, Lionel Messi suffers injury scare — all you need to know
content: Lionel Messi worried fans ahead of the FIFA World Cup after appearing to injure his left hamstring during Inter Miami’s 6-4 MLS win over Philadelphia Union. Messi left in the 73rd minute after providing two assists. Luis Suárez scored a hat-trick as Miami moved second in the Eastern Conference, though Messi’s fitness remains uncertain before Argentina’s World Cup opener.

title: Ravi Kishan predicts National Award win for Ram Charan for 'Peddi'
content: At the vibrant launch of 'Peddi' in Bhopal, actor Ravi Kishan passionately praised the film, likening its motivational storylines to the much-loved movies '3 Idiots' and 'Dangal'. He confidently forecasted that Ram Charan would clinch awards for his role. In a light-hearted moment, Charan addressed a recent viral slip-up where he mistakenly identified a cricketer as a footballer.

title: 'Terrible': Ex-Ranji player dies of heart attack while playing in local match
content: Former Karnataka Ranji cricketer SL Akshay died of a suspected heart attack while playing a local division match in Bengaluru on Sunday. The 39-year-old fast bowler complained of chest pain during fielding and was declared dead at a nearby hospital. Akshay had represented Karnataka in Ranji Trophy and KPL. Former players and KSCA paid tribute, remembering his contributions as both cricketer and coach.

title: Rohit Sharma equals unwanted all-time IPL record after horror duck vs RR
content: Rohit Sharma's IPL 2026 ended on a low note, equaling the record for most ducks with his 19th against Rajasthan Royals. Despite this unwanted statistic, he had a decent individual season with 283 runs in nine games. However, his inconsistent availability contributed to Mumbai Indians' struggles, finishing ninth. Rajasthan Royals secured a playoff spot thanks to Jofra Archer's impactful performance.

title: 'Parag has been criticised for 7 years': Sangakkara makes emotional remark
content: Rajasthan Royals head coach Kumar Sangakkara strongly backed captain Riyan Parag, praising his leadership despite criticism and a vaping controversy. Sangakkara highlighted Parag's respect among teammates and his potential for growth as a player and person. He also clarified Jofra Archer's IPL participation was a joint decision with the ECB, focusing on managing his bowling workload.

title: IPL 2026: KL Rahul, Kuldeep Yadav power Delhi Capitals to dominant win over KKR
content: Delhi Capitals concluded their IPL 2026 campaign with a dominant 40-run victory over Kolkata Knight Riders. KL Rahul's blistering 60 set the tone for Delhi's imposing 203, while Kuldeep Yadav's crucial three-wicket haul dismantled KKR's chase. Despite a strong start from Ajinkya Rahane, KKR faltered, finishing their season with a loss.

title: 'Holding centres' for illegal Bangladeshi, Rohingya immigrants in West Bengal districts
content: the BJP govt in Bengal has commissioned "holding centres" in all 23 districts for illegal immigrants awaiting deportation . the order comes 72 hours after a CM said the govtes would adhere to the "detect, delete and deport" principle in all cases of illegal immigration.

title: Varanasi horror: Sold by mother for Rs 16k & 10 saris, 12-yr-old raped by ‘buyer’, driver
content: Reporting from Varanasi, covering all beats across 10 districts in east UP. With specialisation in political, legal, crime, and developmental stories, he also keeps exploring religious, cultural, sports, lifestyle, and business stories. Enjoys writing features and long form, delivering comprehensive and insightful coverage to readers. Read More

title: How a con woman used sharia law to dupe investors of Rs 6,000 crore
content: the perpetrators targeted unsuspecting persons with a promise of profits of up to 36% per annum on their investment . the scam was masterminded by a woman, nowhera Shaik, based out of Hyderabad . she was arrested last week after being on the run for more than a month .

title: 'India can always count on me, big fan of PM Modi': Gor brings Trump's message
content: 'India can count on me 100%. If they ever need help, they know where to call. they call right here. we're doing well. we have a record economy, a records stock market and anything India wants to get. I am a big fan of Prime Minister Modi," he said .

title: Sub-inspector among 6 cops suspended over explosives on PM Modi convoy route in Bengaluru
content: six police officers, including a sub-inspector, suspended for security lapse during pm's visit to the art of living (AOL) Foundation in the Karnataka capital . explosives were packed in a carton box found near the compound wall of a private property, around 25 feet away from the main road . police sources initially said only two gelatin sticks and a matchbox were found .

title: Delhi's Gymkhana Club to move court against government order
content: Delhi Gymkhana Club (DGC) has been at 2, Safdarjung Road for over 113 years . the club's permanent members had a marathon meeting on Sunday evening to decide the legal course of action . a day after l&DO directed the club to hand over its entire premises .

title: Insta-cleaning your home? You might be training AI
content: a small subset of customers can opt into a programme where household jobs are recorded . the image has sparked widespread unease online . an investor memo linked Pronto's workflows to "physical AI" and robotics training data .

title: The final ‘metamorphosis’: Can cockroaches win against humans in real world?
content: cockroaches have been disliked and despised by humans since ages . but today, they are being “liked” and “followed” like never before . they would never have imagined, even in their wildest dreams, that one day would become the centre of a human movement .
